zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Tendrings於大約1349年出生在英國素福爾可納易藍德時，他的父親William de Tendring32歲，母親Margaret Kerdeston20歲。他於1365年與Katherine Mylde在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1421年在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年74歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Tendrings于大约1349年出生在英国素福爾可納易藍德时，他的父亲William de Tendring32岁，母亲Margaret Kerdeston20岁。他于1365年与Katherine Mylde在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1421年在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年74岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Tendrings was born about 1349, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, William de Tendring, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Kerdeston, was 20. He married Katherine Mylde in 1365, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1421, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Tendrings est né environ 1349, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William de Tendring, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Kerdeston, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Mylde en 1365, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1421, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Tendrings um 1349 in Nayland, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Tendring 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Kerdeston 20. Er hat 1365 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England Katherine Mylde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1421 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England und wurde in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tendrings è nato il circa 1349 nel Nayland, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William de Tendring, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Kerdeston, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Mylde nel 1365, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1421, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Tendringsが約1349年にイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父William de Tendringは32歳，母Margaret Kerdestonは20歳であった。1365年にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでKatherine Myldeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1421年にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで74歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Tendrings(이)가 대략 1349년 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Tendring(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Kerdeston(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1365년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Katherine Mylde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1421년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tendrings nasceu aproximadamente 1349, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Tendring, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Kerdeston, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Mylde em 1365, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1421, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Tendrings родился около 1349 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Tendring было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Kerdeston, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Mylde в 1365 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1421 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия.
